I guess God made Boston on a wet Sunday.
A city is a place where there is no need to wait for next week to get the answer to a question, to taste the food of any country, to find new voices to listen to and familiar ones to listen to again.
I hate small towns because once you've seen the cannon in the park there's nothing else to do.
All the world has been converted and Washington is the modem Mecca.
All cities are mad: but the madness is gallant. All cities are beautiful: but the beauty is grim.
The sea, the majestic sea, breaks everything, crushes everything, cleans everything, takes everything...from me
A full moon sprinkled the black ocean with diamonds, and she could imagine fairies dancing in the silver foam that laced the huge, dark waves.
There's nothing in the sea this fish would fear.
We are going toward the sea. I have swollen. I am carried away.
From time to time, one must release the grime built up inside them to to free their emotions like the ocean.

SWAT have short fire range, but are good at defeating nearby unarmored targets, due to the spread of shots hitting multiple enemies.
These soldiers use rapid-fire automatic weapons. Steel core rounds are more effective at piercing armor.
They are enlisted for solving specific tactical tasks. They can slow the enemies down and set them on fire, inflicting continuous, long term damage.
Relatively low fire rate of fire of sniper rifles is offset by their ability to hit vulnerable parts of the enemy from a greater distance.
Shock waves from missile explosions cover a wide radius, so one hit can directly affect multiple targets.
Ray guns are an excellent means of fighting armored enemies. A soldier's special skills can compensate for quick battery consumption.
They use the most advanced weapons currently available. Plasma charges explode on impact, inflicting devastating damage to multiple enemies over a wide radius.
